label: Cursor CLI
description: Route agent tasks through Cursor's native subagent system. Parallel waves, isolated context windows per agent, no queuing. Best for complex reasoning and architectural work.
installCmd: # Install Cursor from https://cursor.sh then enable CLI from Command Palette → Install cursor command
authNote: Uses your Cursor IDE login — no separate API key needed.
traits: Isolated context windows — no cross-agent bleed
